license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Por qué te ausentaste ayer?
eng_text: Why were you absent yesterday?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Mi padre atrapó tres peces ayer.
eng_text: My father caught three fish yesterday.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Ayer jugué con Tony.
eng_text: I played with Tony yesterday.

spa_text: Ayer fui al parque con Mary.
eng_text: I went to the park with Mary yesterday.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Hoy no hace tanto frío como ayer.
eng_text: It is less cold today than it was yesterday.

spa_text: Ellos fueron de pesca ayer.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Por qué no pudiste dormir anoche?

spa_text: Anoche cayó una gran nevada.
eng_text: It snowed a good deal last night.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Anoche tenía un poco de dolor de cabeza.
eng_text: I had a slight headache last night.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Anoche hubo una helada terrible.

spa_text: Anoche llegué tarde.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Nos divertimos mucho anoche.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¡No fui yo, comisario!

spa_text: Quizás tengas razón, fui un egoísta.

spa_text: Fui al aeropuerto a despedir a un amigo.
eng_text: I went to the airport to see my friend off.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Ayer fui al parque con Mary.

spa_text: Fui a la estación para despedir a un amigo.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Fui tan tonto que le creí.
eng_text: I was foolish enough to believe him.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Fui a la orilla cerca de aquí.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Eso fue probablemente lo que influenció su decisión.
eng_text: That was probably what influenced their decision.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Este día sólo fue una pérdida de tiempo y de dinero.
eng_text: This day was just a waste of time and money.

spa_text: La primera en venir fue Jane.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Nuestro encuentro fue totalmente casual.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

eng_text: That discovery was quite accidental.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Fue un descuido dejarte la llave del coche puesta.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Fue tonto de mi parte creer aquello.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Ese fue el mejor día de mi vida.
eng_text: That was the best day of my life.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Fue un placer conocerlo, señor Tamori.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: No soy un artista. Nunca tuve mente para ello.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Como iba con prisa, tuve que tomar un taxi.
eng_text: As I was in a hurry, I had to take a taxi.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Tuve que echar una buena carrera para coger el tren.
eng_text: I really had to run for it to catch the train.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Tuve la suerte de encontrar un buen trabajo.
eng_text: I had the luck to find a good job.

spa_text: Tuve un sueño terrible anoche.

spa_text: Tuve un sueño terrible.

spa_text: Tuve una pesadilla.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: De repente tuve suerte.

spa_text: No tuve tiempo para comer.
eng_text: I had no time to eat.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Me arrepiento de lo que hice.
eng_text: I'm sorry for what I have done.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

eng_text: I have no regrets about what I did.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Los llamaré cuando regrese mañana.

spa_text: ¡Mírame cuando te hablo!

spa_text: La vida empieza cuando te das cuenta de quién eres realmente.

spa_text: ¿Qué hacía tu madre cuando volviste a casa?

spa_text: Cuando vi el dibujo, me acordé de la historia.

spa_text: Él no es más que un poeta.

spa_text: Ese bebé no hace más que llorar.

eng_text: No less than three hundred dollars was needed for the work.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Es una palabra para la que me gustaría encontrar una sustituta.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Para hacer eso, tienes que arriesgarte.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: No soy un artista. Nunca tuve mente para ello.

spa_text: Los humanos nunca fueron hechos para vivir eternamente.

spa_text: Mi ordenador tiene que ser útil para algo.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Realmente necesitas preguntar para saber la respuesta?

spa_text: Es imposible para mí explicártelo.
eng_text: It's impossible for me to explain it to you.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Todo el mundo debe aprender por sí mismo al final.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Me voy a esforzar por no molestarte en tus estudios.
eng_text: I'll do my best not to disturb your studying.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Por alguna razón, me siento más vivo por la noche.
eng_text: For some reason I feel more alive at night.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Por fin está más o menos explicado.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Por qué lo preguntas?
eng_text: Why do you ask?

eng_text: I won't ask you anything else today.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Por qué no vienes a visitarnos?

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Por qué lamentas algo que no has hecho?
eng_text: Why are you sorry for something you haven't done?

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Gracias por ayudarme. "No hay de qué."
eng_text: Thank you for helping me. "Don't mention it."

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Qué has respondido?

spa_text: ¿Por qué lamentas algo que no has hecho?
eng_text: Why are you sorry for something you haven't done?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Quién ha pintado este cuadro?

spa_text: Robert nunca se ha retrasado a una reunión.

license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Ha terminado con el teléfono?

spa_text: Él ha perdido su reputación.

spa_text: Eso fue probablemente lo que influenció su decisión.

spa_text: Esto es lo que yo habría dicho.

spa_text: Te sorprendería lo que puedes aprender en una semana.

spa_text: —¡Esto es lo que estaba buscando! —exclamó él.

spa_text: Haz lo que te diga.

spa_text: Todo lo que es inventado es verdadero.

spa_text: No preguntéis lo que piensan. Preguntad lo que hacen.

spa_text: Lo que cambia el mundo es la comunicación, no la información.

spa_text: ¡Dame tiempo para darte todo lo que tengo!

spa_text: Aunque es joven, él es muy cuidadoso.

spa_text: Bob se comió el caracol, y entonces vomitó.
eng_text: Bob ate the snail, then vomited.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: A ella le gusta la música. "A mí también."
eng_text: She likes music. "So do I."
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Tengo ganas de jugar a las cartas. "Yo también."
eng_text: I feel like playing cards. "So do I."
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Y sin embargo, también lo contrario es siempre verdadero.
eng_text: And yet, the contrary is always true as well.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Hay también clubs nocturnos donde se baila flamenco.
eng_text: There are also nightclubs where you dance flamenco.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Yamamoto también es uno de mis amigos.
eng_text: Yamamoto is one of my friends too.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Le gusta viajar. A mí me gusta también.
eng_text: He likes traveling and so do I.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Ella no sólo es guapa, sino también amable.
eng_text: She is not only pretty, but also kind.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Ella no habla solamente inglés, también habla francés.
eng_text: She can speak not only English but also French.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Él es médico y también escritor de novelas.
eng_text: He is a doctor and also a novelist.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Él también habla francés.
eng_text: He can also speak French.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: También me gusta la voz de ese cantante.
eng_text: I like the singer's voice, too.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Tampoco lo puedo explicar.
eng_text: I can't explain it either.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Mi padre no bebe alcohol. "El mío tampoco."
eng_text: My father doesn't drink. "Neither does my father."
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: A él no le gusta el deporte. A mí tampoco.
eng_text: He is not fond of sports, and I am not either.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: A él no le gusta el deporte. Y a mí tampoco.
eng_text: He doesn't like sports. Me neither.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Tom no vino, y tampoco Jane.
eng_text: Tom didn't come, nor did Jane.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: No puedo ir, y tampoco quiero.
eng_text: I can't go, nor do I want to.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Si tú no vas, yo tampoco.
eng_text: If you don't go, I won't, either.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Jane nunca olvidará este último año. Nosotros tampoco.
eng_text: Jane will never forget this past year. Neither will we.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Como ella no vino, yo tampoco fui.
eng_text: Since she didn't come, I didn't go either.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Él no les ayudará, ni yo tampoco.
eng_text: He will not help them, nor will I.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Yo tampoco sé qué hacer.
eng_text: I don't know what to do either.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: No quiero que haya malentendidos.
eng_text: I don't want there to be any misunderstanding.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Quiero que me ayudes con mi tarea.
eng_text: I want you to help me with my homework.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Quiero que estés aquí.
eng_text: I want you to be here.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Quiero que vengas aquí.
eng_text: I want you to come here.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Quiero que me digas la verdad.
eng_text: I want you to tell me the truth.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: No quiero que me vean con él.
eng_text: I don't want to be seen in his company.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Quiero que leas esta carta.
eng_text: I want you to read this letter.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Pero quiero que entiendas lo que estoy diciendo.
eng_text: But I want you to understand what I'm saying.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Quiero que te quedes aquí hasta que yo vuelva.
eng_text: I want you to stay here until I get back.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Quiero que retractes lo que acabas de decir.
eng_text: I want you to take back what you said just now.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Quiero que abras la ventana.
eng_text: I want you to open the window.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que él venga.
eng_text: I expect him to come.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que nadie se siente delante de nosotros.
eng_text: I hope no one sits in front of us.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que no me engañen.
eng_text: I hope they aren't deceiving me.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que lleguen pronto.
eng_text: I hope they arrive soon.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que te encuentres bien.
eng_text: I hope you are well.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que te guste.
eng_text: I hope you'll like it.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que te decidas pronto.
eng_text: I hope you'll make up your mind quickly.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Va a llover? "Espero que no".
eng_text: Will it rain? "I hope not."
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que nos volvamos a ver pronto.
eng_text: I hope we see each other again soon.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Crees que vendrá? "Espero que no."
eng_text: Do you think he will come? "I hope not."
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Espero que el vino sea de tu agrado.
eng_text: I hope the wine is to your taste.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: No sé si tengo tiempo.
eng_text: I don't know if I have the time.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Sólo puedo preguntarme si acaso es lo mismo para todos los demás.
eng_text: I can only wonder if this is the same for everyone else.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Si pudiera enviarte un malvavisco, Trang, lo haría.
eng_text: If I could send you a marshmallow, Trang, I would.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Si buscas las letras, realmente no significan mucho.
eng_text: If you look at the lyrics, they don't really mean much.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Cómo podría ser yo un robot? Si los robots no sueñan.
eng_text: How could I be a robot? Robots don't dream.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: No sé si todavía lo tengo.
eng_text: I don't know if I still have it.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Me estaba preguntando si vendrías hoy.
eng_text: I was wondering if you were going to show up today.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Hazme saber si hay algo que yo pueda hacer.
eng_text: Let me know if there is anything I can do.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Si ves un error, entonces corrígelo, por favor.
eng_text: If you see a mistake, then please correct it.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Si no comes, te mueres.
eng_text: If you don't eat, you die.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Hazme saber si necesito hacer cambios.
eng_text: Let me know if I need to make any changes.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Eso sería algo que habría que programar.
eng_text: It would be something I'd have to program.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Qué sería del mundo sin las mujeres?
eng_text: What would the world be without women?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¡Sería genial si pudiera hablar diez idiomas!
eng_text: It would be so cool if I could speak ten languages!
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Sería divertido ver cómo las cosas cambian a través de los años.
eng_text: It would be fun to see how things change over the years.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Sería posible hacer una reservación para jugar golf?
eng_text: Can I make a reservation for golf?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Mi papá me dijo donde sería bueno ir.
eng_text: Daddy told me where it would be nice to go.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Ese chico no es tan travieso como pensábamos que sería.
eng_text: That boy isn't as mischievous as we thought he would be.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Sería mejor si vinieras conmigo.
eng_text: It'd be better if you would come with me.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Ahora sería mejor que nos fuésemos a casa.
eng_text: We'd better go home now.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Y si yo fuera gay, ¿sería eso un crimen?
eng_text: And if I were gay, would that be a crime?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿A qué horas sería mejor para ti?
eng_text: What time will be right for you?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Pensemos en lo peor que podría pasar.
eng_text: Let's consider the worst that could happen.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Cómo podría ser yo un robot? Si los robots no sueñan.
eng_text: How could I be a robot? Robots don't dream.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: No podría haberlo hecho sin ti. Gracias.
eng_text: I couldn't have done it without you. Thank you.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Has dicho que yo no podría ganar nunca?
eng_text: Did you say that I could never win?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Podría explicarnos cómo funciona el lavavajillas?
eng_text: Could you explain how the dishwasher works?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Podría repetirlo, por favor?
eng_text: Could you please repeat that?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Su comunicación podría ser mucho más compleja de lo que pensamos.
eng_text: Their communication may be much more complex than we thought.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Si Ted estuviese aquí, podría ayudarnos a limpiar el cuarto.
eng_text: If Ted were here, he could help us clean our room.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: Jane no podría decir tal cosa.
eng_text: Jane cannot have said such a thing.
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Podría cambiarme esto en dinero suelto?
eng_text: Can you change this into small money?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.

spa_text: ¿Podría usar su teléfono?
eng_text: Can I use your telephone?
license: Tatoeba sentence text, CC BY 2.0 FR unless marked otherwise by contributor export.
